Explanation of Sustainability Strategy
Sebagai bagian dari industri perbankan di Indonesia, Bank Jatim As part of the banking industry in Indonesia, Bank Jatim
mendukung pembangunan berkelanjutan dengan menerapkan supports sustainable development by implementing sustainable
keuangan berkelanjutan sebagaimana regulasi yang berlaku. finance in accordance with applicable regulations. Bank Jatim
Bank Jatim senantiasa menerapkan keuangan berkelanjutan always implements sustainable finance and integrates it into
serta mengintegrasikannya ke dalam strategi maupun proses the Bank’s strategy and business processes. In integrating
bisnis Bank. Dalam mengintegrasikan penerapan keuangan the implementation of sustainable finance throughout the
berkelanjutan di seluruh proses bisnis Bank telah didasarkan Bank’s business processes has been based on the principles of
oleh prinsip integritas, transparansi, dan akuntabilitas. integrity, transparency, and accountability.
Langkah nyata Bank Jatim dalam menerapkan keuangan Bank Jatim’s concrete steps in implementing sustainable
berkelanjutan diwujudkan dengan menyusun Rencana finance are realized by preparing a Sustainable Finance Action
Aksi Keuangan Berkelanjutan (RAKB) yang disetujui oleh Plan (RAKB) which is approved by the Board of Directors of the
Direksi Bank. RAKB merupakan bagian dari rencana bisnis Bank. RAKB is part of Bank Jatim’s business plan and in order
Bank Jatim serta dalam rangka mengimplementasikan to implement article 7 section (1) POJK No. 51/POJK.03/2017
pasal 7 ayat (1) POJK No. 51/POJK.03/2017 concerning the Implementation of Sustainable Finance for
tentang Penerapan Keuangan Berkelanjutan Bagi lembaga Financial Services Institutions. Issuers and Public Companies
Jasa Keuangan. Emiten dan Perusahaan Publik (POJK (POJK Sustainable Finance). The priorities for implementing
Keuangan Berkelanjutan). Prioritas implementasi Keuangan Sustainable Finance at Bank Jatim include:

Pegawai tetap merupakan pegawai Bank yang diangkat Permanent employees are Bank employees who are appointed
menjadi pegawai tetap dengan Surat Keputusan Direksi. as permanent employees with a Board of Directors Decree.
Pegawai tidak tetap merupakan pegawai Bank yang tidak Non-permanent employees are Bank employees who are not
diangkat/belum diangkat sebagai pegawai tetap. Tenaga Alih appointed/have not been appointed as permanent employees.
Daya (outsourching) merupakan pegawai dari perusahaan Outsourced workers are employees from service provider
penyedia jasa yang dipekerjakan di Bank, yang ditempatkan companies who are employed at the Bank, who are placed
pada bagian Administrasi dan non Administrasi. Dalam rangka in the Administration and non-Administration sections. To
mendukung program Pemerintah, Bank menyelenggarakan support the Government’s program, the Bank organizes an
program pemagangan melalui Jatimers Internship Program internship program through the Jatimers Internship Program
(JIP) bagi talenta-talenta muda untuk dapat berkontribusi (JIP) for young talents to be able to contribute to the banking
di dunia perbankan sebagai experience dan pengembangan world as experience and competency development so that
kompetensi agar siap memasuki dunia kerja. Bank Jatim juga they are ready to enter the world of work. Bank Jatim also
memberikan kesempatan magang kepada mahasiswa yang provides internship opportunities for students who are/or have
sedang/atau sudah lulus sebagai pemenuhan kebutuhan graduated as a fulfillment of university program needs/literacy

pegawai Bank Jatim merupakan pegawai penuh waktu. Selain employees are full time employees. In addition, Bank Jatim

content:
From an economic perspective, the
ekonomi, Bank Jatim telah mengidentifikasi adanya risiko Bank has identified credit risk, market risk, liquidity risk, and
kredit, risiko pasar, risiko likuiditas dan risiko operasional. operational risk.
Risiko kredit merupakan risiko dalam penyaluran kredit Credit risk refers to the potential losses arising from Bank
Bank Jatim yang timbul dari faktor seperti SDM yang kurang Jatim’s lending activities due to factors such as inadequately
kompeten, analisis kredit yang kurang tepat, pendanaan di skilled human resources, inaccurate credit analysis, financing
sektor berisiko tinggi, konsentrasi kredit, dan investasi pada in high-risk sectors, credit concentration, and investments in
perusahaan yang kurang bonafide. Hal ini dapat menyebabkan companies with low creditworthiness. These factors may result
gagal bayar karena harus pembentukan CKPN, menimbulkan in default, necessitate the establishment of an Allowance for
biaya penyelesaian kredit, serta kerugian akibat kegagalan Impairment Losses (CKPN), incur credit settlement costs, and
proses settlement. Upaya mitigasi yang dilakukan yaitu lead to losses due to failed settlement processes. To mitigate
dengan peningkatan pengetahuan dan profesionalisme these risks, Bank Jatim has undertaken several measures,
analis kredit, perbaikan sistem dan prosedur perkreditan, including enhancing the knowledge and professionalism of
pembinaan serta monitoring kredit yang sudah disalurkan, credit analysts, improving credit systems and procedures,
penagihan intensif terhadap nasabah yang Dalam Perhatian providing guidance and monitoring for disbursed loans,
Khusus (DPK), peningkatan supervisi kredit, penerapan intensifying debt collection efforts for deposit customers
prinsip Prudential Banking dalam ekspansi kredit, serta (DPK), strengthening credit supervision, applying the principles

Bank Jatim menyadari bahwa setiap kegiatan bisnis yang Bank Jatim realizes that every business activity it conducts
dilakukan memiliki potensi terjadinya tindak korupsi di berbagai carries the potential for corruption in various aspects of the
aspek perusahaan. Manajemen Bank telah mengidentifikasi dua company. The bank’s management has identified two functions
fungsi yang memiliki tingkat risiko tinggi, yaitu fungsi pengadaan with a high level of risk: the procurement of goods and services,
barang dan jasa yang melibatkan hubungan langsung dengan which involves direct interaction with business partners, and
mitra bisnis, serta fungsi kredit yang berhubungan dengan tingkat the credit function, which is related to the level of transparency
transparansi dalam penyaluran kredit. in credit distribution.
Bagi kasus yang terindentifikasi tindak kecurangan, akan For cases identified as fraudulent, further action will be taken
ditindaklanjuti dengan melakukan investigasi pelaporan dan through investigation, reporting, and sanctions carried out by
sanksi yang dilakukan oleh Divisi Audit Intern. Perseroan the Internal Audit Division. The company mitigates risks by
melakukan langkah mitigasi melalui pemanfaatan sarana utilizing its whistleblowing system, which allows individuals
pengaduan pelanggaran whistleblowing system yang to report violations through various channels.

secara berkala melakukan penilaian atau review terhadap regularly conducts performance assessments and reviews for

seluruh pegawai berdasarkan prestasi kerja tanpa membedakan out fairly, based on work achievements without discrimination
jenis kelamin. Bank Jatim telah melakukan sistem penilaian between genders. Bank Jatim applies a performance
pegawai dengan menerapkan sistem manajemen kinerja management system using the Balanced Scorecard method to
berupa metode Balance Scorecard. Dalam penilaian kinerja evaluate employees’ individual performance. The assessment
individu pegawai digunakan Aplikasi KPI Scorecard untuk process is supported by the KPI Scorecard Application, which

karir yang bertujuan untuk mempersiapkan, mengembangkan aimed at preparing, developing, and retaining employees to
dan mempertahankan karyawan agar dapat menampilkan perform at their best, both now and in the future. The Bank
kinerja terbaiknya, baik pada masa kini maupun di masa has a structured career development program or promotion
yang akan datang. Bank memiliki program pengembangan program for employees, ranging from entry-level officials to
karir berjenjang atau program promosi bagi pegawai dari executive positions, conducted to fill vacant roles. Employee
pejabat tingkat pertama sampai dengan pejabat eksekutif career development is based on two aspects: competency and

kosong. Pengembangan karir pegawai didasarkan pada 2 (dua) employee performance evaluation. Competency assessments

[OJK G.3]
Response to 2023 Sustainability Report Feedback
Sepanjang tahun 2024, Bank Jatim tidak mendapatkan umpan Throughout 2024, Bank Jatim did not receive feedback from
balik dari pemangku kepentingan atas Laporan Keberlanjutan stakeholders on the 2023 Sustainability Report, so there is no
tahun 2023, sehingga tidak terdapat informasi terkait tindak information regarding the follow-up actions taken. However,
lanjut yang dilakukan. Namun demikian, Bank Jatim terus Bank Jatim continues to improve the quality of the report so
menyempurnakan kualitas laporan sehingga memenuhi that it meets the guidelines, namely the Consolidated Set of
panduan, yaitu Consolidated Set of GRI Standard 2021, POJK GRI Standard 2021, POJK No.51/POJK.03/2017, and SEOJK
No.51/POJK.03/2017, dan SEOJK No.16/SEOJK.04/2021. No.16/SEOJK.04/2021.
